utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Umm ma am , do you have a minute ? I kind of have some bad news . I do not think I can move to Tulsa .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I kind of have some bad news . I do not think I can move to Tulsa .

utterances.speaker: Ms. McKenna
utterances.text: What ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not think I can move to Tulsa .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is a funny story , actually .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I kind of fell asleep in the meeting this morning so when I said I would move to Tulsa , I did not really know what I was saying .

utterances.speaker: Ms. McKenna
utterances.text: You fell asleep ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But only because I was up all night worried about this meeting , ai not that funny ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Irony ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Not a fan , alright .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: See , here is the thing .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I went home and told my wife about Tulsa and she will not go .

emotion_cause.span: 10_I went home and told my wife about Tulsa and she will not go .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: See , me , I love Tulsa !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Tulsa is heaven !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Tulsa is Italy ... Please do not make me go there !

emotion_cause.span: 13_Please do not make me go there !

utterances.speaker: Ms. McKenna
utterances.text: Chandler , I ...

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No no no !

emotion_cause.span: 13_Please do not make me go there !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Look , Carol , can I call you Carol ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Wh ... why would I when your name is Elaine ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh what a great picture of your son , strapping !

emotion_cause.span: 18_what a great picture of your son , strapping !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is a picture of your daughter , is not it , well she is lovely .

emotion_cause.span: 19_That is a picture of your daughter

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I like a girl with a strong jaw .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I will call you from Tulsa .
